toolPurpose: Convert a human-readable address or location name into geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude). Supports multiple address formats and returns the most relevant match with geographic bounds.

address.description: The address to geocode (e.g., '1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington, DC' or 'Eiffel Tower, Paris')

components.description: Filter results by place component (e.g., 'country:us' to restrict to United States)

bounds.description: Bias results to within a bounding box (format: 'south,west|north,east')

toolPurpose: Convert geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) into a human-readable address. Returns address components including street, city, state, postal code, and country.

location_type.description: Filter results by location type (ROOFTOP, RANGE_INTERPOLATED, GEOMETRIC_CENTER, APPROXIMATE)

toolPurpose: Search for places near a location based on keyword, place type, or both. Returns a list of nearby places with basic information including name, location, rating, and place ID.

open_now.description: Return only currently open places (requires use of 'durationMs' for time-based queries)

toolPurpose: Retrieve comprehensive details about a specific place including full address, phone number, website, hours of operation, reviews, photos, and ratings.

place_id.description: Google Places API place ID (obtained from place search results)

fields.description: Specific fields to retrieve (e.g., 'formatted_address', 'opening_hours', 'reviews', 'photos', 'rating'). Specify only needed fields to optimize quota usage.

reviews_sort.description: Sort reviews by relevance or newest

toolPurpose: Calculate directions and routing between an origin and destination. Returns the best route, alternative routes, turn-by-turn instructions, distance, and travel duration.

origin.description: Starting point as address, coordinates (lat,lng), or place ID (format: 'place_id:ChIJ...')

destination.description: Ending point as address, coordinates (lat,lng), or place ID

alternatives.description: Return alternative routes (multiple paths between origin and destination)

waypoints.description: Intermediate waypoints to pass through (returns multi-leg route)

avoid.description: Features to avoid on the route (e.g., 'tolls', 'highways', 'ferries')

traffic_model.description: Traffic model for estimated arrival time (requires departure_time)

departure_time.description: Departure time for traffic-aware routing (RFC 3339 format or 'now')

arrival_time.description: Desired arrival time for transit routing (RFC 3339 format)
